title: Guarding Against SSRF: New Security Measures

topics.title: Security Enhancements
topics.summary: A recent merge in the npmx repository addresses potential security vulnerabilities related to SSRF by restricting metadata fetching to allowlisted hosts. This proactive measure aims to mitigate risks associated with user-controlled input that could lead to malicious server interactions.

topics.title: New Badge Discovery
topics.summary: A new badge has been spotted on select packages within the npmx.dev ecosystem, generating curiosity among users. This whimsical badge is not widely available, prompting discussions about its significance and the specific packages it adorns.
